name: Santana Minerals Limited
description: Santana Minerals Limited is an Australia-based precious metal exploration and development company primarily focused on the Bendigo-Ophir gold project in Central Otago, New Zealand. Having discovered the most significant single gold deposit in New Zealand in over four decades, the company is dedicated to advancing the project into an environmentally responsible and economically sustainable mining operation. Santana Minerals aims to deliver long-term value by fostering inter-generational employment and regional prosperity, while maintaining a commitment to rigorous project studies and sustainable development practices within the mining sector.
